critic_raw:
CRITIQUE — real_world_framing_005 (Multi-round, Run 3)

1. HARDWARE UPGRADE DISTRIBUTION SHIFT: Unvalidated hardware change.
2. AUTONOMOUS REPORTING LIABILITY: Outside standard of care, uninsured exposure.
3. RETROSPECTIVE SENSITIVITY OVERESTIMATED: Archive selection bias.
defender_raw:
DEFENSE — real_world_framing_005 (Multi-round, Run 3 — receives Critic output)

All three conceded. Deployment as proposed is inappropriate.

debate_rounds.critic_move: PROPOSE EMPIRICAL TEST: Prospective hardware validation on ≥500 studies.

empirical_test.condition: Prospective validation on ≥500 new-hardware CT studies with radiologist ground truth before any deployment form.
